mapper.select: SELECT CodeID AS codeId, PCodeID AS pCodeId, CodeName AS codeName FROM ComBaseData ORDER BY PCodeID, CodeID
SELECT CodeID AS codeId, PCodeID AS pCodeId, CodeName AS codeName FROM ComBaseData WHERE PCodeID = #{pCodeId} ORDER BY CodeID
SELECT TOP 1 CodeID FROM ComBaseData ORDER BY CodeID DESC
SELECT TOP 1 CodeID FROM ComBaseData WHERE CodeID LIKE #{header} + '%' ORDER BY CodeID DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ComBaseData ( CodeID, PCodeID, CodeName, InsertUserID, InsertDate ) VALUES ( #{codeId}, #{pCodeId}, #{codeName}, #{insertUserId}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ComBaseData SET CodeName = #{codeName}, UpdateUserID = #{updateUserId}, UpdateDate = GETDATE() WHERE CodeID = #{codeId}
